title: Governed Adaptive Knowledge State Substrate
description: Generalize governed temporal state into Subject, Domain, and KnowledgeState records for people, projects, organizations, products, policies, hypotheses, models, and the NKS, using the journaled mutation and receipt foundation established in Sprint 5.
acceptance_criteria: Subject, Domain, and KnowledgeState schemas are generic and platform-neutral
Context, confidence, temporal validity, provenance, interpretive authority, behavioral authority, sensitivity, and lineage are explicit
Journal, receipt, recovery, audit, repository, schema, and generated-view integrations exist
At least one human and two nonhuman subject classes pass the same functional contract
Human-agency, consent, privacy, and self-declaration protections are preserved as stricter policy overlays
